# IServerNotifier.NotifyAsync method

Emits a request-scoped notification on the originating request's stream.

```csharp
public Task NotifyAsync(JsonRpcNotification notification)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| notification | The notification to deliver. |

## Return Value

A task that completes when the notification has been handed to the transport.
